name: Lemon-Rosemary Apple Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Apples, peeled and cored, sliced
3 tablespoons Unsalted butter, cold and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
Filling: Preheat oven to 450°F. Prepare a heavy dish, pie plate (9-inch), or single layer cake pan. Finely crush the dried rosemary. Combine with sugar, lemon juice, and zest in a large bowl. Stir until well mixed. Add apples and stir again to coat. Place in baking dish.
Topping: In a medium bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and crushed rosemary. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Gradually add cream or milk, stirring until a soft dough forms. Knead lightly on a floured surface 10-12 times. Roll to fit the baking dish, place over apples, seal edges, and cut slits. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown. Serve warm with cream.
